fields.name: impactLevel
fields.label: Impact Level
fields.description: Select the NIST 800-53 impact level baseline to tailor.

fields.name: systemType
fields.label: System Type
fields.description: Optional system type to help tailor the baseline.

reportDir.description: Optional directory where the selected NIST baseline output should be written.

quiet.label: Quiet output
quiet.description: Suppress progress output while selecting and tailoring the baseline.
